features: 【Combs in Assorted Types】 Set includes Rat tail comb, Picks, Lifters, Curl rakes, Teasing combs, Seperators and more. Using them for hair cutting, hair styling, hair dyeing and creates a perfect hairstyle.

【Hair Clips】 Our plastic-made sectioning hair clips will provide reliable cutting and hairstyling. The silvery finish hair styling clips have a sturdy body and can be used for long-lasting performance.
【Hair Protective】 Combs can easily loosen complexed knotted hair, reduce pain, reduce hair loss and avoid hair damage to the hair layer.
【Anti-static Hair Comb】 The hairdressing combs are made of anti-static material, ensure that your hair does not become irritated by static electricity during the dry season.

【Versatility】 Suitable for long or short hair, thin or thick hair, our comb set and hair clip easily matches any style, keeps your hairstyle fresh and amazing. Widely used for salon styling, blow drying, home DIY, makeup application.
